calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-08-2019 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-08-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept: 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Proceedings Not Reported.

Gregory R. Shaughnessy, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Cannon Constructors North, Inc., a California corporation.
David Nielsen, Operations Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants CEM Builders, Inc., a California corporation, doing business as Tucker Engineering, David B. Rossi, an individual, or Lesley R. Matheson, an individual.
The Court makes a finding that these three defendants have voluntarily absented themselves from today's proceedings and do not with to contest the allegations set forth in plaintiff's complaint.

Plaintiff's complaint for breach of contract and conversion was filed on April 9, 2018.
General Denials from defendants David B. Rossi, an individual, and Lesley R. Matheson, an individual, were filed on May 18, 2018.
Default as to defendant CEM Builders, Inc., doing business as Tucker Engineering, was entered on May 31, 2018.
Dismissal as to defendant Accredited Surety and Casualty was filed on May 1, 2018.
Dismissal as to defendant Suretec Indemnity Company was filed on June 28, 2018.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on August 29, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, April 8, 2019.
Plaintiff's Trial Brief was filed today, April 8, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Cannon Constructors North, Inc., a California corporation, and against defendants CEM Builders, Inc., a California corporation, doing business as Tucker Engineering, David B. Rossi, an individual, and Lesley R. Matheson, an individual, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $740,955.79.
Attorney Fees - $10,000.00.
Costs - $600.00.
Total - $751,555.79.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2018 Set For Trial On Apr-08-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
